summary: Tested CryptoNai multi-language support (FR/EN/ES) and multi-chain wallet detection. All translation tests passed. Blockchain detection for Ethereum, Bitcoin, and Solana addresses works correctly.

minor.issue: Login API slow (~20s response time) due to NewsData.io rate limiting affecting server performance

context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language translation system working for all 3 languages (FR/EN/ES). Tab bar uses key={`tabs-${language}`} for re-render on language change. Multi-chain wallet detection correctly identifies Ethereum (0x...), Bitcoin (bc1...), and Solana (base58) addresses. Non-EVM wallet balance shows '--' as placeholder (MOCKED - no real API for BTC/SOL balance).

tab_bar_key_fix.status: VERIFIED - Forces re-render on language change

mocked_apis.Non-EVM wallet balance: Shows '--' as placeholder - no real API call for BTC/SOL balance
